project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Launch Settings Profile.ShoppingSystem.Microservice.Gateway: https.executor": "Debug", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.ShoppingSystem.Microservice: http.executor": "Run", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.ShoppingSystem.Microservice: https.executor": "Debug", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "copilot.chat.legacySessionMetadata.migrated": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "settings.sync", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "com.intellij.ide.scratch.ScratchImplUtil$2/New Scratch File": [ "PLAIN_TEXT" ] } }
